description: Personal finance dashboard — UAE bank spending analytics. Historical data is encoded in metric labels (ym, year, month) so the time-picker only needs to be 'now-5m to now'; all historical months are always visible.

panels.description: Sum of all debit transactions for the selected month.
panels.title: Total Spend (AED)

panels.description: Number of debit transactions recorded for the selected month.
panels.title: Transaction Count

panels.description: Average debit transaction size for the selected month.
panels.title: Avg per Transaction (AED)

panels.description: Absolute value of credit / refund transactions received this month.
panels.title: Total Refunds (AED)

panels.description: Total spend minus refunds (credits reduce the net figure).
panels.title: Net Spend (AED)

panels.description: Total spend for the entire selected year.
panels.title: Year-to-Date (AED)

panels.description: Spend against monthly budget limits for the selected month. Set budgets via POST /api/budget.
panels.title: Budget vs Actual — $year-$month

panels.description: How budgeted amounts are distributed across categories.
panels.title: Budget Allocation

panels.description: Donut chart of spending per category for the selected month. Hover slices for exact amounts.
panels.title: Spend by Category

panels.description: Horizontal bar gauge showing spend per category, sorted largest to smallest.
panels.title: Category Comparison (AED)

panels.description: Highest-spend merchants for the selected month, with category and transaction count.
panels.title: Top 10 Merchants This Month

panels.description: Money in vs money out for the chequing account per month, parsed from bank statements.
panels.title: Monthly Cash Flow — Chequing

panels.description: Money in vs money out for the savings account per month, parsed from bank statements.
panels.title: Monthly Cash Flow — Savings

panels.description: Savings account balance and income recorded each month via /api/monthly-config. Enter values via POST /api/monthly-config.
panels.title: Savings Balance & Income — Monthly

panels.description: Most recent savings_balance entered via /api/monthly-config.
panels.title: Latest Savings Balance (AED)

panels.description: Most recently recorded monthly income.
panels.title: Latest Income (AED)

panels.description: Outstanding principal + remaining profit.
panels.title: Total Outstanding (AED)

panels.description: Percentage of total monthly budget consumed (includes overspend).
panels.title: Budget Used (%)

panels.description: Sum of amounts spent beyond their budget limit across all categories.
panels.title: Total Overspent (AED)

panels.description: Total unspent budget remaining across all on-track categories.
panels.title: Budget Remaining (AED)

panels.description: Per-category budget utilization. Green = spent within budget, red = overspent, gray = remaining budget.
panels.title: Budget vs Actual — per Category

title: Budget Exporter
